/usr/bin/ar qc libATIO.a CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/atfs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/audioreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/audioreaderflac.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/audioreadervorbis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/audioreaderwav.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/audioutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/blobimage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/cartridgeimage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/cartridgetypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/cassetteaudiofilters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/cassetteblock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/cassettedecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/cassetteimage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfsarc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfscpm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfsdos2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfsdos3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfssdx2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfssdx2util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskfsutil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskimage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/diskimageutil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/partitiondiskview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/partitiontable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/programimage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/savestate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/tapepiecetable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/vorbisbitreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/vorbisdecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/vorbismisc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/wav.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATIO.dir/source/audioreaderflac_x86.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libATIO.a
